description: Composition Grey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and has distressed graphic print with embroidery on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Don that sporty look and gear up for the challenge with the spirit of the boxers of the Brooklyn Boxing Club with this T-shirt from locomotive. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
